name: Piece
teaser: The best New Haven style pizza I've ever had...in Chicago.
review: It's the best New Haven style pizza I've ever had...in Chicago. I think of it more as a beer hall but if I lived here it would be in heavy rotation.
headsUp: More of a beer hall than a pizzeria. Stay for a few pints.
update: The New Haven pies remain the best version of that style in Chicago.
